zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Cordie or Cordray於1530年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯時，她的父親Thomas Cordray II47歲，母親Joan Seymour55歲。她和Thomas Henry Wing至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1575年3月10日在英國英格蘭盧特藍德諾斯 盧費納姆享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cordie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: occupational name for a maker of cord or string, from an agent derivative of Old French corde ‘string’.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew or ‘light’, a Hebraicized form of various original Ashkenazic surnames.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.
Chinese: Hokkien form of the surname 胡, see   Hu   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Cordray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French coer de roi ‘(having the) heart of a king’. This surname is now extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Cordrey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Cordray . Alternatively, possibly derived from Old French corderie ‘ropery, rope-walk’, taken to mean a worker at a ropery.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Cordie or Cordray was born in 1530, in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Cordray II, was 47 and her mother, Joan Seymour, was 55. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Thomas Henry Wing. She died on 10 March 1575, in North Luffenham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cordie or Cordrayが1530年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヒガム フエレルズで生まれた時，父Thomas Cordray IIは47歳，母Joan Seymourは55歳であった。彼女はThomas Henry Wingとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1575年3月10日にイギリスイギリスルトランドノース ルフエンハムで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cordie or Cordray(이)가 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 히그함 페레르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Cordray II(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Seymour(은)는 55세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Henry Wing(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1575년 3월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 노르스 루펜함에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Cordie or Cordray родилась в 1530 г. в местности хаиам фиррирс, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Cordray II было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Seymour, 55. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Thomas Henry Wing. Она умерла 10 марта 1575 г. в местности норт луффенам, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
